command:
echo '=== AETHER LAUNCHD ===' && cat ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.hyo.aether.plist && echo '=== AETHER LOGS ===' && ls -lt /tmp/hyo-aether.log 2>/dev/null && tail -60 /tmp/hyo-aether.log 2>/dev/null | head -60 && echo '=== FEED AETHER ENTRIES ===' && python3 -c "
import json
with open('/Users/kai/Documents/Projects/Hyo/website/data/feed.json') as f:
    d = json.load(f)
aether = [r for r in d['reports'] if 'aether' in r.get('author','').lower() or 'aether' in r.get('id','').lower()]
print(f'Total aether reports in feed: {len(aether)}')
for r in aether:
    print(f'  {r[\"id\"]} | {r[\"timestamp\"]}')
"
